name: Uranus
intro: Uranus, the Aesthereal Defender, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Radiance
abilities.description: Heal Uranus absorbs the energy generated by incoming attacks to strengthen himself, regenerating a certain amount of HP every 0.8s. Each stack lasts 10s. When at max stacks (20), Uranus regenerates 48-224 HP (scales with level). Skill terms Healing Effect The actual ratio of self HP Regen caused to shield values. The default is 100%. Actual Value = Original Value × (100% ± Healing Effect Increase/Reduction%) × (100% ± Healing Effect Increase/Reduction%) × ...

abilities.name: Ionic Edge
abilities.description: AOE Slow Uranus releases two energy blades that orbit around him, dealing 155–255 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemy targets and slowing them by 30% for 2s. Each time this skill deals damage to a target, they will be marked with stack for 6s (max of 1 stack per target per cast). Each stack increases the damage of this skill by 40% (to a max of 320%). Each energy blade will only deal damage to the same target once. Skill terms Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).

abilities.name: Transcendent Ward
abilities.description: Mobility Shield Uranus charges to the target location, dealing 80–200 (+20% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies along the way, and 160–400 (+80% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies at the target location and slowing them by 25%. Uranus also generates a 300–750 (+200% Total Magic Power) shield for 4s. The shield explodes at the end of its duration or when destroyed, dealing 300–750 (+150% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies nearby. Skill terms Shield Special HP is preferentially deducted when taking damage. The shield with shorter duration or lower points is usually preferentially deducted when multiple shields are stacked. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).

abilities.name: Consecration
abilities.description: Buff Speed Up Uranus unleashes the energy stored within his body, removing slow effects on himself, recovering 200-400 HP, and gaining 60% Movement Speed for 8s (decays over time). Uranus directly gains 5-15 stacks of Radiance, increasing shields received and HP Regen by 20% for 8s. Skill terms Healing Effect The actual ratio of self HP Regen caused to shield values. The default is 100%. Actual Value = Original Value × (100% ± Healing Effect Increase/Reduction%) × (100% ± Healing Effect Increase/Reduction%) × ... Slow Immunity You are immune to enemy slow effects within the duration.
